design_philosophy: A harmonious blend of the 5 natural elements (Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Space) applied to a high-performance sports venue SaaS. The interface prioritizes clarity, generous spacing, and organic colors, rejecting the sterile 'corporate tech' look for a grounded, welcoming, and energetic experience.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-indigo-950
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-indigo-950

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-all bg-emerald-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-800 hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all bg-white border border-stone-200 text-indigo-950 rounded-xl hover:bg-stone-50 hover:border-stone-300 shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors text-stone-600 rounded-xl hover:text-indigo-950 hover:bg-stone-100
buttons.danger_fire: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-all bg-orange-600 rounded-xl hover:bg-orange-700 shadow-sm

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.marketing_feature: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-3xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-lg text-indigo-950 placeholder:text-stone-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 transition-all
inputs.label: block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-indigo-950

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50
navigation.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-40 w-64 bg-indigo-950 border-r border-indigo-900 text-stone-300

hero_sports_venue.description: Wide-angle photograph of a modern, high-end indoor sports venue at golden hour.

elements_abstract_bg.description: Abstract textural background inspired by the 5 elements of nature.

tennis_court.description: White chairs and table on a clay tennis court.

football_turf.description: Empty soccer stadium with green field and orange seats.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Strictly adhere to the 5 elements color palette mapping: Earth (Emerald), Water (Sky Blue), Fire (Orange), Air (Stone/White), Space (Indigo). Use these intentionally. For example, use Fire (Orange) for alerts or high-peak pricing times, Earth (Emerald) for primary actions like booking, and Space (Indigo) for high-level dashboard text.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for page backgrounds, use bg-stone-50 instead to give an airy, organic feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Always apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements for testing.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For the Booking Calendar UI, use a grid layout. Color-code time slots based on availability or pricing (e.g. Fire/Orange for Peak, Air/Stone for Off-Peak).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Install @phosphor-icons/react for icons. Use the 'duotone' weight.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: The Super Admin and Tenant Admin dashboards must use 'The Control Room Grid' pattern (tight gaps, dense information, cardless or 1px border cards). The customer booking page must use 'The Bento Grid' pattern (generous padding, asymmetrical, highly visual).
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not build complex components from scratch. Utilize Shadcn components (calendar, dropdown, dialog, tabs) but strip their default borders and radii to match the 'rounded-xl' and 'border-stone-200' aesthetics defined here.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Use Framer Motion to add subtle entrances to dashboard widgets.
